name: context-handoff
description: Inject context-usage handoff guidance as Codex threads approach context pressure.

interface.shortDescription: Guide Codex to hand off long threads before context pressure is too high.
interface.longDescription: Context Handoff watches Codex lifecycle token-count events and injects concise guidance when a thread crosses context-usage thresholds. It asks the agent to conserve context, prepare a durable Markdown handoff plan, and move substantial remaining work to a fresh thread with the same working directory, branch, model, and reasoning effort.
